enum_values.name: KeepBoth
enum_values.summary: Both the AsyncTask objects in comparison should be kept.

enum_values.name: KeepOther
enum_values.summary: The current instance of AsyncTask should be discarded while keeping the other AsyncTask in comparison.

enum_values.name: KeepThis
enum_values.summary: The current instance of AsyncTask should be kept while discarding the other AsyncTask in comparison.
